name: Simple Trivia Quiz
description: Multiple-choice trivia quiz. The agent receives a question with four labelled choices and must respond with a single letter (A/B/C/D).

binding_vow.description: Multiple-choice trivia quiz. The agent receives a question with four labelled choices and must respond with a single letter (A/B/C/D).

reward.description: 1.0 if the chosen letter matches the correct answer, 0.0 otherwise
